wgsProductContext.plainEnglishMeaning: This result is a WGS product-boundary report. It records marketplace context and explicitly marks missing order, lab, WGS output, health-screen, clinical validation, and authenticated sample outputs unavailable.

uncertainty: No calibrated order-completion, turnaround, sample-quality, variant-detection, disease, carrier-status, clinical-sensitivity, or WGS-quality model is supplied for this local package.
The selected rows support product-boundary context only and cannot be treated as completed sequencing or health-screen output.
limitations: This validation result uses product-boundary evidence only; raw genome data, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, VCF, and complete callset files are not included.
The package does not emit sequencing files, alignment files, complete SNP tables, complete genome-wide analysis files, coverage tables, variant calls, or clinical screening output files.

The package does not diagnose disease, estimate disease risk, classify pathogenicity, report carrier status, infer medication response, report ancestry, validate clinical sensitivity, or recommend screening, testing, treatment, diet, supplements, or lifestyle changes.
